PROP-01b-partial-inv-034.text: Auction end via performUpkeep must only process assets with non-zero auctionStart.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-034.assertion: forall performUpkeep(ended): s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0 => valid; == 0 => revert InvalidAuction

locations.note: s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0 check at line 362 reverts InvalidAuction before ending
